segments.text: Ho! Everyone who thirsts, Come to the waters; And you who have no money, Come, buy and eat. Yes, come, buy wine and milk Without money and without price.
segments.speaker: God

footnotes: * Likely a prophetic call or divine invitation

segments.text: Why do you spend money for what is not bread, And your wages for what does not satisfy?
Listen carefully to Me, and eat what is good, And let your soul delight itself in abundance.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Incline your ear, and come to Me. Hear, and your soul shall live; And I will make an everlasting covenant with you— The sure mercies of David.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Indeed I have given him as a witness to the people, A leader and commander for the people.
Surely you shall call a nation you do not know, And nations who do not know you shall run to you, Because of the Lord your God, And the Holy One of Israel; For He has glorified you.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Seek the Lord while He may be found, Call upon Him while He is near.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Let the wicked forsake his way, And the unrighteous man his thoughts; Let him return to the Lord, And He will have mercy on him; And to our God, For He will abundantly pardon.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: For My thoughts are not your thoughts, Nor are your ways My ways
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: For as the heavens are higher than the earth, So are My ways higher than your ways, And My thoughts than your thoughts.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: For as the rain comes down, and the snow from heaven, And do not return there, But water the earth, And make it bring forth and bud, That it may give seed to the sower And bread to the eater
So shall My word be that goes forth from My mouth; It shall not return to Me void, But it shall accomplish what I please, And it shall prosper in the thing for which I sent it.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: For you shall go out with joy, And be led out with peace; The mountains and the hills Shall break forth into singing before you, And all the trees of the field shall clap their hands.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Instead of the thorn shall come up the cypress tree, And instead of the brier shall come up the myrtle tree; And it shall be to the Lord for a name, For an everlasting sign that shall not be cut off.
segments.speaker: God
